recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: Möbius
recommendations.overview: An FSB officer falls in love with his agent, an American woman who works as a trader in a Russian bank.

recommendations.title: Bloody Milk
recommendations.overview: Pierre, in his thirties, is a breeder of dairy cattle. His life revolves around his farm, his veterinarian sister and his parents whose livestock he took over. As the first cases of a zoonotic outbreak are reported in France, Pierre discovers that on

recommendations.title: Scum
recommendations.overview: Powerful, uncompromising drama about two boys' struggle for survival in the nightmare world of Britain's notorious Borstal Reformatory.

recommendations.title: Wall Street: Money Never Sleeps
recommendations.overview: As the global economy teeters on the brink of disaster, a young Wall Street trader partners with disgraced former Wall Street corporate raider Gordon Gekko on a two tiered mission: To alert the financial community to the coming doom, and to find out

recommendations.title: Black Cat, White Cat
recommendations.overview: A small-time hustler makes a deal with a notorious gangster to whom he owes money: marry his teenage son to the latter's daughter. However, the young lovers are not as agreeable.

recommendations.title: Bad Day for the Cut
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged Irish farmer, who still lives at home with his mother, sets off on a mission of revenge when the old lady is murdered.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Copied
recommendations.overview: A young photocopier operator becomes infatuated with his neighbor and, unable to afford anything from her shop, turns to shady schemes to make money.

recommendations.title: The Protector 2
recommendations.overview: Kham finds himself in trouble when he is accused of killing a trader. While on the run from the trader's nieces who are martial artists, Kham meets a friend who warns him of a terrorist plot.

recommendations.title: The Hummingbird Project
recommendations.overview: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fiber-optic cable deal.
